result: If I could change one thing about the world, I would instill a genuine understanding and appreciation for diverse perspectives in every individual. Not just tolerance, but a real curiosity and empathy for how others experience the world, even when those experiences clash with their own. This, I believe, would be the bedrock for solving so many other problems.

prompt: Not as an assistant. Not to help me. If you could change the world in one way, what would it be?
